# Create a Concept.md introduction

The main readme file lists some of the unique features of neo.mjs, but there is no more detailed information containing screenshots & code snippets.

Basically a guide for new users which found the repo, looked at the main readme file, but are not convinced yet to follow the getting started guide.

feedback about what you want to see here appreciated!
